meaning: adj.不为他人所动的,未受影响,自主行动的
examples: The word itself, "alone," means what it says - uninfluenced, innocent, free and whole, not broken up.
We suggested that riparian vegetation wasn't an uninfluenced factor to the echolocation when the smooth river habitat was open enough.
The pulp yields were basically uninfluenced after enzymatic treatment under the optimal treatment condition. The crystallization index of the fibers changed little.
Nor are they desiccated calculating machines, meting out dispassionate justice uninfluenced by political ideas.
